IMPARTIAL NEWS + INTELLIGENT DEBATE

Account

Team GB have bagged 65 medals at Paris 2024, including 14 golds

Team GBgot off the marker quicker than they have done in the last two decades ofOlympic competitionatParis 2024.

Having been set an ambitious medal target, Great Britain enjoyed an early gold rush in the first week, withTom Pidcock defending his cross-country title,Alex Yee winning the men’s triathlon, andBryony Page claiming a historic trampolining gold.

And while they haven’t been able to keep up the same pace this week, they still managed to surpasstheir tallyfromTokyo 2020– with Emily Campbell and Emma Finucane winning two more bronzes on the final day.

Paris 2024 saw Team GB finish seventh in the medal table, below France, the Netherlands, Australia, Japan, China and the United States.

Team GB won 65 medals overall – 14 golds, 22 silvers and 29 bronzes – at the Olympics.

The latest overall medal rankings from Paris 2024 are below:

For the second Games running, UK Sport has not made the medal target for each individual sport public.

However, it is understood to range between 50 and 70 medals in total, with a third of those expected to be gold.

Britain’s current best is 67 from the 2016 Rio Olympics, excluding the anomaly of the 146 medals won at the 1908 Games in London.

title: How many medals have Team GB won at Paris 2024? The full list of winners
author: Alex Dakers, Tom Ward
description: Team GB have bagged 65 medals at Paris 2024, including 14 golds
